summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Repack Inventory System changes. All 11 backend tests pass. Frontend UI correctly shows derived quantities, parent info, and repack badges with multipliers. Verified repack inventory adjustment is blocked and sales properly deduct from parent.
passed_tests: BACKEND TESTS (11/11 passed):
- Inventory endpoint shows repacks with derived_from_parent=true
- Inventory endpoint shows parent info (parent_name, parent_stock, parent_unit)
- Repack total_stock = parent_stock × units_per_parent (e.g., 10 parent × 10 units = 100 repack)
- Product search returns calculated available for repacks
- Product search shows derived_from_parent=true for repacks
- Adjusting repack inventory returns 400 error with helpful message
- Error message mentions adjusting parent instead
- Adjusting parent inventory works normally
- Selling repack deducts from parent (10 pieces sold / 10 units_per_parent = 1 parent deducted)
- Existing repacks (R Lannate, R GALIMAX) show correct derived quantities
- Repack badge shows units_per_parent for multiplier display (×10, ×50, ×100)
FRONTEND TESTS:
- Inventory page loads with data-testid='inventory-page'
- Search functionality works with data-testid='inventory-search'
- Repack badges show multiplier: 'Repack (×10)', 'Repack (×50)', 'Repack (×100)'
- 'derived' label appears under repack quantities
- 'From: Parent Name (X.XX Unit)' shows parent info for each repack
- Calculated stock displays correctly (e.g., R Lannate 250g: 88 Sachet = 8.8 parent × 10)
INTEGRATION TEST (API):
- Created sale with repack: 10 pieces of R Lannate 250g
- Parent stock correctly reduced: 9.8 → 8.8 (reduced by 1 box = 10 pieces / 10 units_per_parent)
- Repack derived stock updated: 98 → 88 (reflects new parent stock × 10)
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_repack_inventory.py - Created comprehensive backend tests for repack inventory system
seed_data_creation: Created test invoice SI-20260219-0029 with repack sale for integration testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Repack inventory system fully implemented and tested. Key changes: 1) Repacks don't have their own inventory - it's derived from parent_stock × units_per_parent, 2) Cannot adjust repack inventory directly (returns 400 error), 3) Selling repacks deducts from parent (quantity / units_per_parent). Test credentials: admin/admin123. Backend test file: /app/backend/tests/test_repack_inventory.py.

feature_implementation_details.inventory_endpoint_changes: GET /api/inventory now returns derived_from_parent, parent_name, parent_stock, parent_unit for repacks
feature_implementation_details.product_search_changes: GET /api/products/search-detail calculates available from parent stock for repacks
feature_implementation_details.inventory_adjust_changes: POST /api/inventory/adjust returns 400 error for repacks with helpful message
feature_implementation_details.invoice_creation_changes: POST /api/invoices deducts from parent inventory when selling repacks (quantity / units_per_parent)
feature_implementation_details.frontend_display: InventoryPage.js shows 'derived' label, 'From: Parent Name' info, and Repack badge with multiplier (×N)
